summary.window_recommendation: Review only until an approved weekend window is opened

front_proxy.detail: nginx active, upstream traffic normal, only low-level TLS noise in recent logs.

origin.detail: app container up; unicorn, postgres, redis, nginx present; no current outage signatures.

wireguard.detail: Front to origin WireGuard path is current and serving the active upstream.

ip_passthrough.detail: Origin access.log currently records real client IPs through the front proxy trust chain.

sidekiq.detail: Live runtime is healthy but still carries a temporary hotfix; next rebuild must validate the candidate Sidekiq and connection_pool combination before signoff.

backups.detail: Latest verified remote backup exists in discourse-backups; backup_with_uploads remains disabled to avoid duplicate media data.

uploads_cdn.detail: R2 uploads and files.rdfzer.com are healthy in production, but this path is not formally listed as supported in current Meta uploads docs.

notes: /admin/update is not authoritative for this pinned detached-commit deployment model.
Official Sidekiq upstream added connection_pool 3 forward compatibility, but current official Discourse latest avoids the old failure by using sidekiq 7.3.10 plus connection_pool 2.5.5.
Routine backups should remain DB-only while uploads stay in the separate R2 bucket.
